name: section_id
label: Section ID
help_text: Unique HTML ID for this section (used for anchor links).

name: heading
label: Heading
default: Engineering intelligence system with trusted context

name: subtitle
label: Subtitle
default: With an execution layer where data, semantics, controls, and AI operate as one system in production

name: card_layout
label: Desktop card layout
choices: Single row (all cards in one line; scrolls horizontally if needed)
help_text: Applies at 1025px and wider. Narrower viewports keep a single stacked column.

children.name: icon_svg
children.label: Icon SVG
children.help_text: Paste inline SVG markup for the card icon.

default.title: AI-Native Intelligence Systems
default.description: We engineer the core layer across platforms, pipelines, governance, and knowledge so AI systems can sense, reason, and operate on trusted enterprise data.

default.icon_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="16" y="16" width="6" height="6" rx="1"/><rect x="2" y="16" width="6" height="6" rx="1"/><rect x="9" y="2" width="6" height="6" rx="1"/><path d="M5 16v-3a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h12a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v3"/><path d="M12 12V8"/></svg>
default.title: Connected Business Context
default.description: We connect data, semantics, policy, lineage, and domain knowledge so copilots, agents, and decision systems understand the business before they act.

default.icon_svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 13c0 5-3.5 7.5-7.66 8.95a1 1 0 0 1-.67-.01C7.5 20.5 4 18 4 13V6a1 1 0 0 1 1-1c2 0 4.5-1.2 6.24-2.72a1.17 1.17 0 0 1 1.52 0C14.51 3.81 17 5 19 5a1 1 0 0 1 1 1z"/><path d="m9 12 2 2 4-4"/></svg>
default.title: Governed Autonomous Action
default.description: We operationalize decision intelligence, generative AI, and agentic workflows on Evoq so intelligence becomes governed action at enterprise scale.
